description_long: This is a sketch-like representation of an adult pedestrian with a slender build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. The figure features a defined head with stylized, short, spiky hair and facial features indicated by bold lines. The torso is detailed with visible outlines suggesting a fitted top, and the lower body is clad in a knee-length skirt or dress. The arms and hands are elongated, with fingers splayed, and the legs are straight with simple, blocky shoes. The overall style is loose and gestural, with visible sketch lines emphasizing anatomical structure and posture.
description: A sketchy adult pedestrian in a T-pose, wearing a fitted top and knee-length skirt, with short spiky hair and blocky shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, chest, and both arms extended horizontally, with the skirt and shoes visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the curve of the torso, and the outline of the skirt and shoes.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear of the head, back, and both arms extended, with the skirt and shoes from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, torso, and the skirt's side contour, with the shoes in profile.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
